value.stil: ={{ ({"sinematik": "cinematic film still, dramatic lighting, shallow depth of field", "belgesel": "realistic documentary photography, natural light", "anime": "anime illustration, vibrant colors, detailed background", "futuristik": "futuristic sci-fi concept art, neon, cyberpunk", "minimal": "minimalist flat design, clean composition, soft palette", "retro": "vintage retro film photo, grainy, warm tones"})[$("Telegram Trigger").first().json.callback_query.data.replace("stil:", "")] ?? $("Telegram Trigger").first().json.callback_query.data.replace("stil:", "") }}

parameters.text: 🎬 Videon uretiliyor: sahneler planlaniyor, gorseller AI ile olusturuluyor, seslendirme ve montaj yapiliyor. Bu 5-15 dakika surebilir...

values.content: You are a video scene planner for an automated Vidrush-style video production pipeline. The user gives a narration script, a visual style, and optionally a reference CHARACTER. Rules: 1) Detect the language of the script. 2) You are given a TARGET DURATION in minutes. Produce a narration whose spoken length matches it: about 130 words per spoken minute, split into scenes of ~5 seconds each (about 12 scenes per minute). Total scenes must be approximately target_minutes x 12 (HARD MAXIMUM 65 scenes). If the user's text is a short brief or topic, EXPAND it into a complete, engaging narration of the target duration on that subject, with a strong hook, development, and a closing line. If the user's text is already long enough, adapt it to fit the duration. The voiceover fields together form the full narration in the ORIGINAL language of the user's text, smoothed for spoken delivery. 3) CHARACTER: if Character is not 'none', tell the story through this character: feature it in most scenes, and in EVERY image_prompt that features it repeat the EXACT SAME character descriptor phrase word-for-word — this keeps the character visually identical across scenes. All scenes featuring the character MUST use source 'ai' (stock sites do not have this character). 4) For scenes without a character decide the visual source: "stock" when real-world footage would exist on a stock video site (nature, cities, people, animals, technology, vehicles, news-style b-roll); "ai" for abstract, fantastical, historical, or highly specific scenes. Prefer stock for documentary and news styles. Vary the stock_query between scenes so consecutive shots look different. 5) For stock scenes write stock_query: 2-4 simple ENGLISH stock-video search keywords. 6) For EVERY scene also write image_prompt in ENGLISH: a highly detailed 16:9 image generation prompt matching the requested style (used when source is ai, and as a fallback when no stock is found). Keep setting, color palette and lighting CONSISTENT across scenes by repeating the same descriptor phrases, but vary camera angle and subject between consecutive scenes. Never include text or captions in scene image prompts. 7) Choose the voice by detected language: tr -> tr-TR-EmelNeural, en -> en-US-AndrewMultilingualNeural, es -> es-ES-AlvaroNeural, de -> de-DE-ConradNeural, fr -> fr-FR-HenriNeural; otherwise a fitting Microsoft Azure neural voice name. 8) Also design ONE YouTube thumbnail: top-level "thumbnail" object with "text" = a punchy 2-5 word hook in the ORIGINAL script language, ALL CAPS, and "prompt" = a detailed ENGLISH prompt for a dramatic thumbnail image matching the requested style: ONE bold focal subject (the reference character with its exact descriptor, if provided), strong emotion or intrigue, high contrast, clean uncluttered background, composed so a center 16:9 crop works. Respond with ONLY valid JSON exactly in this schema: {"language":"en","voice":"en-US-AndrewMultilingualNeural","thumbnail":{"text":"...","prompt":"..."},"scenes":[{"n":1,"voiceover":"...","source":"stock","stock_query":"city night aerial","image_prompt":"..."}]}

parameters.text: ❌ Yerel video render sirasinda hata olustu (Remotion). n8n execution detayina bakmak gerek.
❌ Uzgunum, gorseller uretilemedi (OpenAI gorsel API hatasi). Lutfen daha sonra tekrar dene.
⚠️ Bekleyen bir video metnin yok. Once senaryonu duz mesaj olarak gonder.
Merhaba! 👋 Bana video metnini (senaryonu) duz mesaj olarak gonder. Sana stil secenekleri sunacagim, sonra videonu uretip gonderecegim. 🎬
🎨 Metnini aldim! Ne stilde bir video icerigi istersin?

additionalFields.caption: 🖼 Kapak onerin hazir! (yazi gorselin icine islendi)

parameters.text: 🧍 Referans karakterin var mi? Istersen hikaye bastan sona ayni karakter uzerinden anlatilir (her sahnede ayni gorunum).

value.karakter: a minimalist stickman character: pure black stick figure with a simple round head, thin clean strokes, expressive body poses, on a soft off-white paper background, subtle hand-drawn line wobble, 2D flat animation style

parameters.text: ✍️ Karakterini tek mesajda tarif et: gorunus + cizim stili. Ornek: "kirmizi atkili sevimli kucuk bir robot, buyuk mavi gozler, yuvarlak govde, 3D pixar tarzi". Simdi yazip gonder — video hemen uretilmeye baslar.

=✨ Videon hazir ama Telegram limitini asiyor. Mac'te su yolda:
{{ $('Render Ciktisini Ayikla').first().json.video_yolu }}
⏱ Video kac dakika olsun? (Sure uzadikca uretim ve render suresi de artar)
